sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_contradictioninfo_t A where validflag>0
A.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
A.adddepartment in ($rkdept$)
A.sponsor in ($zbdept$)
($sql$)
A.cdtresult like '%$cdtresult$%'
A.isshield = $isshield$
A.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
A.cdtcontent like '%$cdtcontent$%'
(A.sponsor = $rolefilterdept$ or FIND_IN_SET($rolefilterdept$,A.assistdept))
A.nowstate = $nowstate$
STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$startTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$updatestartTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$updateendTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d')
(A.sponsor in (SELECT pcsid FROM sys_xtjzd_role where xtjzdid=$zdDeptid$))

select A.*,dp.departname as sponsorname,dp1.departname AS rkdept from (select ct.id,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName SEPARATOR ',') as typename,ct.cdtname,ct.sponsor, ct.cdtlevel,ct.addtime,ct.adddepartment,ct.cdtresult,ct.isshield,ct.cdtcontent,ct.ssrs, ct.memo,ct.sfdz,ct.nowstate,ct.cdttype,ct.examineman,ct.examinetime,ct.examineopinion,ct.assistdept,ct.updatetime,ct.type,ct.cdtcode from e_contradictioninfo_t ct LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where ct.validflag>0
ct.type = $type$
ct.sponsor = #unitFilter#
ct.iswjxxy = #personFilter#
group by ct.id)A LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp on A.sponsor=dp.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp1 ON A.adddepartment = dp1.id where 1=1
A.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
A.adddepartment in ($rkdept$)
A.sponsor in ($zbdept$)
($sql$)
A.cdtresult like '%$cdtresult$%'
A.isshield = $isshield$
A.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
A.cdtcontent like '%$cdtcontent$%'
(A.sponsor = $rolefilterdept$ or FIND_IN_SET($rolefilterdept$,A.assistdept))
A.nowstate = $nowstate$
STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$startTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$updatestartTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$updateendTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d')
(A.sponsor in (SELECT pcsid FROM sys_xtjzd_role where xtjzdid=$zdDeptid$))
order by A.updatetime desc
$sortsql$,A.updatetime desc
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_contradictioninfo_t (cdtname,cdtcontent,cdtlevel,cdttype,cdtresult,sfdz,sfdzx,sfdzy,ssrs,sjje,isshield,nowstate,validflag,adddepartment,addoperator,addtime, examineman,examinetime,examineopinion,updateoperator,updatetime,memo,assistdept,sponsor,ssdwxx, sdpcsldxx,sdpcsmjxx,zfqtmbxx,yfhg,isjq,qxx,iswjxxy,xxyxx,jtsq) VALUES ('$cdtname$','$cdtcontent$','$cdtlevel$','$cdttype$','$cdtresult$','$sfdz$','$sfdzx$','$sfdzy$','$ssrs$','$sjje$',$isshield$,1,$validflag$,$adddepartment$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$' ,'$examineman$','$examinetime$','$examineopinion$','$updateoperator$','$updatetime$','$memo$','$assistdept$',$sponsor$,'$ssdwxx$', '$sdpcsldxx$','$sdpcsmjxx$','$zfqtmbxx$','$yfhg$',$isjq$,'$qxx$',$iswjxxy$,'$xxyxx$','$jtsq$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_contradictioninfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM e_contradictioninfo_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$

select B.*,dp.departname as sponsorname from (select A.id,GROUP_CONCAT(sdp.departname SEPARATOR ',') as assistdept,max(A.typename) as typename,max(A.cdtname) as cdtname,MAX(A.sponsor) as sponsor,max(A.cdtlevel) as cdtlevel, max(A.adddepartment) as adddepartment,max(A.cdtresult) as cdtresult,max(A.isshield) as isshield,max(A.cdtcontent) as cdtcontent,max(A.ssrs) as ssrs, max(A.memo) as memo,max(A.sfdz) as sfdz,max(A.nowstate) as nowstate,max(A.sjje) as sjje from(select ct.id,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName SEPARATOR ',') as typename,max(ct.cdtname) as cdtname,MAX(ct.sponsor) as sponsor,max(ct.cdtlevel) as cdtlevel, max(ct.adddepartment) as adddepartment,max(ct.cdtresult) as cdtresult,max(ct.isshield) as isshield,max(ct.cdtcontent) as cdtcontent,max(ct.ssrs) as ssrs, max(ct.memo) as memo,max(ct.sfdz) as sfdz,max(ct.nowstate) as nowstate,max(ct.sjje) as sjje,max(ct.assistdept) as assistdept from (select * from e_contradictioninfo_t where id=$id$) ct LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where ct.validflag>0 group by ct.id)A LEFT JOIN sys_department_t sdp on FIND_IN_SET(sdp.id,A.assistdept) GROUP BY A.id)B, sys_department_t dp where B.sponsor=dp.id
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_contradictioninfo_t SET nowstate = $nowstate$,examineman='$examineman$',examinetime='$examinetime$',examineopinion='$examineopinion$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT a.* from( select '引发涉稳事件' AS eventtype, etitle as eventname,fssj as eventtime,sjgk as eventdetail from e_eventsinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 and fssj !="" UNION select '情报线索信息' AS eventtype,ltitle,ldate,lcontent from e_leadsinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 and ldate !="" UNION select '稳控化解情况' AS eventtype,csgs,lsdate,lsqkks from e_defuseinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 and lsdate !="" UNION select '工作交办管理' AS eventtype,wtitle,xftime,wcontent from e_workinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 and xftime !="" UNION select '处置化解情况' AS eventtype,htitle,hdate,hcontent from e_handleinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 and hdate !="")AS a order by a.eventtime desc

SELECT B.*,d.departname as sponsorname FROM( SELECT A.*,GROUP_CONCAT(dp.departname SEPARATOR ',') as assistdeptname FROM(SELECT ct.*,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName SEPARATOR ',') as typename FROM(SELECT * FROM e_contradictioninfo_t WHERE id = $id$) ct LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) )A LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp on FIND_IN_SET(dp.id,A.assistdept))B LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on B.sponsor=d.id
select cdtname from e_contradictioninfo_t where validflag>0 and type=1
select ct.id,ct.cdtname from e_keypersonnel_t kp LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id=kp.cdtid where kp.personnelid=#personnelid# and kp.validflag>0 and ct.validflag>0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_contradictioninfo_t SET isshield = $isshield$,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.cdtresult text,count(e.id) value from (SELECT '已化解' AS cdtresult FROM DUAL UNION SELECT '已钝化' AS cdtresult FROM DUAL UNION SELECT '处置中' AS cdtresult FROM DUAL) A LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e on e.cdtresult=A.cdtresult and e.isshield=0 and e.type=1 and e.validflag>0 GROUP BY A.cdtresult order by FIELD(text,'已化解','已钝化','处置中');

SELECT A.id, A.basicName name, getCdttypeCount ( A.id ) value FROM ( SELECT b.id, b.basicName, count( b2.id ) zino FROM sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t b2 ON b2.parentid = b.id AND b2.validflag > 0 AND b2.basicType = 39 WHERE b.parentid = 0 AND b.validflag > 0 AND b.basicType = 39 GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.sort, b.id ) A WHERE getCdttypeCount ( A.id ) > 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

select b.basicName text,count(e.id) value from sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.cdtlevel = b.basicName AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 WHERE basicType=93 GROUP BY b.basicName ORDER BY b.sort,b.id;

select b.basicName text,count(e.id) value from sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.ssrs = b.basicName AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 WHERE basicType=43 GROUP BY b.basicName ORDER BY b.sort,b.id;

SELECT d1.id, REPLACE(d1.departname,'派出所','') text, d1.np value, count( 1 ) memo FROM ( SELECT d.id, d.departname, count( 1 ) np FROM ( SELECT id, departname FROM sys_department_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND departtype = 4 AND id != 55 GROUP BY departname ORDER BY id ) d LEFT JOIN p_personnel_t p ON p.jdunit1 = d.id AND p.isrisk = 1 AND p.validflag > 0 GROUP BY d.id ) d1 LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.sponsor = d1.id AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 GROUP BY d1.id;

SELECT d1.id, REPLACE(d1.departname,'派出所','所') name, cast(count( e.id )/(SELECT count(1) from e_contradictioninfo_t WHERE isshield = 0 AND type = 1 AND validflag > 0)*100 as DECIMAL(18,1)) value FROM sys_department_t d1 LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.sponsor = d1.id AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 WHERE d1.validflag > 0 AND d1.departtype = 4 AND d1.id != 55 GROUP BY d1.id ORDER BY d1.id;

SELECT A.addmonth ,DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL A.addmonth MONTH),'%Y.%m') name ,count(e.id) value from( select 1 as addmonth from dual UNION select 2 as addmonth from dual UNION select 3 as addmonth from dual UNION select 4 as addmonth from dual UNION select 5 as addmonth from dual UNION select 6 as addmonth from dual UNION select 7 as addmonth from dual UNION select 8 as addmonth from dual UNION select 9 as addmonth from dual UNION select 10 as addmonth from dual UNION select 11 as addmonth from dual UNION select 12 as addmonth from dual )A LEFT JOIN e_contradictioninfo_t e ON e.addtime>=DATE_SUB(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01'),' 00:00:00') ,INTERVAL A.addmonth MONTH) and DATE_SUB(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01'),' 23:59:59') ,INTERVAL (A.addmonth-1) MONTH)>e.addtime AND e.isshield = 0 AND e.type = 1 AND e.validflag > 0 GROUP BY A.addmonth ORDER BY A.addmonth desc;
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO e_contradictioninfo_t (cdtname,type,cdtlevel,cdttype,cdtresult,ssrs,sfdz,examinetime,examineopinion,cdtcontent,addtime,addoperator,nowstate,sponsor,iswjxxy,xxyxx, adddepartment,validflag,updateoperator,updatetime,memo) VALUES ('$cdtname$',2,'$cdtlevel$','$cdttype$','$cdtresult$','$ssrs$','$sfdz$','$examinetime$','$examineopinion$','$cdtcontent$','$addtime$','$addoperator$',0,$sponsor$,$iswjxxy$,'$xxyxx$', $adddepartment$,$validflag$,'$updateoperator$','$updatetime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID

INSERT INTO e_zbeventinfo_t (datatype,cdtid,name,type,result,memo,addtime,addoperator,addoperatorid,validflag,updateoperator,updatetime) VALUES ($datatype$,$cdtid$,'$name$','$type$','$result$','$memo$','$addtime$','$addoperator$',$addoperatorid$,$validflag$,'$updateoperator$','$updatetime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from e_zbeventinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
datatype = $datatype$

select * from e_zbeventinfo_t where validflag>0 and cdtid=$cdtid$
datatype = $datatype$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE e_zbeventinfo_t SET validflag = 0,updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$' WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select * from e_zbeventinfo_t where id=$id$
select count(*) from (select * from e_keypersonnel_t where personnelid=$personnelid$ and validflag>0)kp left join e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id = kp.cdtid and ct.type=$type$ where ct.validflag>0
select ct.* from (select * from e_keypersonnel_t where personnelid=$personnelid$ and validflag>0)kp left join e_contradictioninfo_t ct on ct.id = kp.cdtid and ct.type=$type$ where ct.validflag>0

select ct.*,ei.etitle,ei.sjgk,li.lcontent,li.czqkgs,li.ltitle,dp.departname as sponsorname,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName SEPARATOR ',') as typename, di.lsqkks,wi.wcontent,hi.hcontent from e_contradictioninfo_t ct left join (select * from e_eventsinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 order by addtime desc limit 1) ei on ei.cdtid=ct.id left join (select * from e_leadsinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 order by addtime desc limit 1) li on li.cdtid=ct.id left join (select * from e_defuseinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 order by addtime desc limit 1) di on di.cdtid=ct.id left join (select * from e_workinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 order by xftime desc limit 1) wi on wi.cdtid=ct.id left join (select * from e_handleinfo_t where cdtid=$id$ and validflag>0 order by hdate desc limit 1) hi on hi.cdtid=ct.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp on ct.sponsor=dp.id LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where ct.id=$id$

select count(*) from e_contradictioninfo_t_zfw A where validflag>0
A.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
A.adddepartment in ($rkdept$)
A.sponsor in ($zbdept$)
($sql$)
A.cdtresult like '%$cdtresult$%'
A.isshield = $isshield$
A.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
A.cdtcontent like '%$cdtcontent$%'
(A.sponsor = $rolefilterdept$ or FIND_IN_SET($rolefilterdept$,A.assistdept))
A.nowstate = $nowstate$
STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$startTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$updatestartTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$updateendTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d')
(A.sponsor in (SELECT pcsid FROM sys_xtjzd_role where xtjzdid=$zdDeptid$))

select A.*,dp.departname as sponsorname,dp1.departname AS rkdept from (select ct.id,GROUP_CONCAT(bm.basicName SEPARATOR ',') as typename,ct.cdtname,ct.sponsor, ct.cdtlevel,ct.addtime,ct.adddepartment,ct.cdtresult,ct.isshield,ct.cdtcontent,ct.ssrs, ct.memo,ct.sfdz,ct.nowstate,ct.cdttype,ct.examineman,ct.examinetime,ct.examineopinion,ct.assistdept,ct.updatetime,ct.type,ct.cdtcode from e_contradictioninfo_t_zfw ct LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t bm on FIND_IN_SET(bm.id,ct.cdttype) where ct.validflag>0
ct.type = $type$
ct.sponsor = #unitFilter#
ct.iswjxxy = #personFilter#
group by ct.id)A LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp on A.sponsor=dp.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t dp1 ON A.adddepartment = dp1.id where 1=1
A.cdtlevel like '%$cdtlevel$%'
A.adddepartment in ($rkdept$)
A.sponsor in ($zbdept$)
($sql$)
A.cdtresult like '%$cdtresult$%'
A.isshield = $isshield$
A.cdtname like '%$cdtname$%'
A.cdtcontent like '%$cdtcontent$%'
(A.sponsor = $rolefilterdept$ or FIND_IN_SET($rolefilterdept$,A.assistdept))
A.nowstate = $nowstate$
STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$startTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$endTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.addtime,'%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE('$updatestartTime$','%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE('$updateendTime$','%Y-%m-%d') >= STR_TO_DATE(A.updatetime,'%Y-%m-%d')
(A.sponsor in (SELECT pcsid FROM sys_xtjzd_role where xtjzdid=$zdDeptid$))
order by A.updatetime desc
$sortsql$,A.updatetime desc
SELECT * FROM e_contradictioninfo_t_zfw WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
